disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus-stricken cruise ship expected to arrive in the Netherlands - The Washington Post
updates.body_en: Hantavirus-stricken cruise ship expected to arrive in the Netherlands The Washington Post
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒疫情邮轮预计抵达荷兰。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus latest updates: Canada reports first presumptive case linked to MV Hondius as global total hits 11 - Yahoo
updates.body_en: Hantavirus latest updates: Canada reports first presumptive case linked to MV Hondius as global total hits 11 Yahoo
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大报告首例与MV Hondius相关的推定病例，全球共11例。

updates.title_en: The National | Canadian tests positive for hantavirus - CBC
updates.body_en: The National | Canadian tests positive for hantavirus CBC
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大一人汉坦病毒检测阳性。

updates.title_en: Medic with hantavirus symptoms in London hospital as nine virus contacts to arrive in UK - Yahoo News UK
updates.body_en: Medic with hantavirus symptoms in London hospital as nine virus contacts to arrive in UK Yahoo News UK
updates.summary_zh: 伦敦医院收治一名有汉坦病毒症状的医护人员，9名接触者将抵英。

updates.title_en: Medic with hantavirus symptoms in united kingdom hospital as nine virus contacts to arrive
updates.summary_zh: 英国医院收治有汉坦病毒症状的医护人员，9名接触者将抵达。

updates.title_en: Health worker hospitalised with hantavirus symptoms as nine more arrive in united kingdom
updates.summary_zh: 卫生工作者因汉坦病毒症状住院，另有9人抵达英国。

updates.title_en: California , Arizona Residents in Quarantine after Hantavirus
updates.summary_zh: 加州和亚利桑那州居民因汉坦病毒被隔离。

updates.title_en: MV Hondius to dock in Rotterdam amid hantavirus quarantine plan
updates.summary_zh: MV Hondius 号邮轮计划在鹿特丹靠港并实施汉坦病毒隔离。

updates.title_en: MV Hondius nears end of voyage after hantavirus ordeal - DW.com
updates.body_en: MV Hondius nears end of voyage after hantavirus ordeal DW.com
updates.summary_zh: MV Hondius 号在汉坦病毒事件后接近航程终点。

updates.title_en: In Tierra del Fuego, a hunt for the rodent carrier of hantavirus - Yahoo
updates.body_en: In Tierra del Fuego, a hunt for the rodent carrier of hantavirus Yahoo
updates.summary_zh: 火地岛展开搜寻汉坦病毒啮齿类宿主的行动。

updates.title_en: Canadian authorities confirm first case of hantavirus | World News - Hindustan Times
updates.body_en: Canadian authorities confirm first case of hantavirus | World News Hindustan Times
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大当局确认首例汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: Medic with hantavirus symptoms in UK hospital as nine virus contacts to arrive - London Evening Standard
updates.body_en: Medic with hantavirus symptoms in UK hospital as nine virus contacts to arrive London Evening Standard Nine UK citizens exposed to hantavirus returning to Britain Sky News Medic treated in UK as nine Britons exposed to hantavirus arrive The Telegraph
updates.summary_zh: 英国医院收治一名有汉坦病毒症状的医务人员，另有九名接触者即将抵达。

updates.title_en: Canada confirms hantavirus case linked to cruise ship outbreak that has killed three passengers
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大报告一例汉坦病毒病例，与已致三人死亡的邮轮疫情相关。

updates.title_en: Canadian hantavirus case confirmed by national laboratory test
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大国家实验室确认一例汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: Canadian National Health Agency Confirms 1 Positive Hantavirus Test
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大国家卫生机构确认一例汉坦病毒阳性检测。
加拿大报告首例汉坦病毒病例。
